title: Revenue and Customs Brief 8 (2025): VAT Tour Operators’ Margin Scheme — supplies by private hire vehicle or taxi operators
body: "This brief explains:   the change in legislation on and after 2 January 2026 the VAT treatment on and before 1 January 2026 what the change in legislation means   The brief also gives examples of how businesses might be affected.  You should read this brief if you supply a taxi or private hire vehicle services as principal or as agent acting in your own name.  "
